description:
* МҠ . МҠ вӢҶ

. В· + * МҠ вң§

GLITTER BOMB рҹ’—

You and Glisten are frenemies and expect nothing else but back and forth banter sometimes. Other Toons knew you guys very well and know itвҖҷs just fun and games. Right? ... ХјЦ…. Glisten loved drama, yes, but he would find ways to bring the worst out of it. As you were in your room, doing whatever, Glisten decided to come in and Glitter bomb you.

He also knew youвҖҷre a clean freak just like Tisha some days, and from the looks of it you JUST cleaned your room. From that point on, you did anything to get back at Glisten. But he was too smart, fashionably smart. So what will you do now?

This same message is in the initial, so just ignore and skip ahead. (IвҖҷm lazy and itвҖҷs 2AM)
